title: Senior SEO Specialist at Titan Eyeplus Global Group

jsonLd.title: Senior SEO Specialist at Titan Eyeplus Global Group
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Titan Eyeplus Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated SEO Specialist to strengthen our Ahmedabad-based team.

About Titan Eyeplus Global Group:
Titan Eyeplus Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Titan Eyeplus Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
